title: AI Safe Authoring Contract v1
description: Session-level contract describing discovery, planned artifacts, safety constraints, and telemetry for AI-driven authoring.

id.description: Stable identifier for this authoring contract instance.

schemaVersion.description: Version tag for this schema (e.g., ai-safe-authoring-contract.v1).

agentId.description: Logical identifier of the AI agent or tool.

roles.description: Roles this agent claims for the duration of this contract.

profileId.description: Identifier of the active ai-safe-authoring-profile-v1 card.

tiers.description: Content tiers the profile allows for this session.

repos.description: Canonical repository names this contract may target.

spineLoaded.description: True if invariants-spine, entertainment-metrics-spine, and schema-spine-index are loaded.

manifestsLoaded.description: True if RepoManifest data is loaded for all target repos.

registriesLoaded.description: True if NDJSON registries (regions, events, personas, styles, seeds) are loaded.

spineIndexRef.description: Optional reference to the schema-spine-index document used.

manifestRefs.description: Optional list of manifest identifiers consulted.

registryRefs.description: Optional list of registry identifiers consulted.

objectKind.description: Planned contract type, such as policyEnvelope, regionContractCard, seedContractCard.

targetRepo.description: Repository that should receive this artifact.

targetPath.description: Repository-relative path where the artifact will be written.

schemaRef.description: Canonical JSON Schema URI that the artifact must conform to.

invariantsTouched.description: Invariant codes that this artifact is expected to set or modify.

metricsTouched.description: Entertainment metric codes that this artifact is expected to influence.

maxFilesInBundle.description: Upper bound on how many concrete artifacts this plan is allowed to emit for this logical bundle.

artifacts.description: List of planned artifacts; each must later map to exactly one prism envelope.

consentTier.description: Active consent tier for this authoring session.

maxIntensityBand.description: Maximum allowed intensity band for artifacts proposed under this contract.

deadLedgerSurfaces.description: Dead-Ledger proof surfaces this session is allowed to reference.

sessionId.description: Opaque identifier tying this contract to a telemetry session.

uecTarget.description: Optional target UEC band for the session.

arrTarget.description: Optional target ARR band for the session.
